seo.description: A polished demo portfolio site showcasing every v1 widget and multi-page navigation.

paragraphs: Explore every registered v1 widget across six demo pages — layouts, gallery, apps, careers, and about. All images are generic placeholders.

props.heading: Featured work
props.subheading: Portfolio-style cards with tags, meta, and CTAs

cards.title: Layout containers
cards.description: Row, column, and grid layout widgets with nested intro blocks.

cards.title: Photo gallery
cards.description: Images grid and media swiper carousel on a dedicated page.

cards.title: App catalog
cards.description: Rich product cards with store badges and screenshot carousels.

cards.title: Open roles
cards.description: Tabbed careers section with requirements and apply links.

items.title: Every widget
items.text: Cover banner, intro, project grid, info grid, images grid, apps showcase, careers tabs, follow us, and media swiper.

items.title: Multi-page nav
items.text: Header links resolve relative paths from any page depth — home, layouts, gallery, apps, careers, and about.

items.title: Layout nesting
items.text: Row, column, and grid containers can wrap any leaf widget, including other layout widgets.

items.title: Placeholder assets
items.text: Generic placeholder images and icons — no real product or studio branding.
